name: Oven Baked German Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Toppings (syrup of your choice, confectioners sugar, brown sugar, fruit mixed with yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a well-aired 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
3. In a bowl, combine the eggs and flour.
4. Add milk, melted butter, and salt; mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until puffed.
7. Cut into serving pieces.
8. Serve with desired toppings.
